name: DJ Doggy
profile:
佘鸣宇（Mingyu Shr）aka DJ Doggy，中国电子音乐制作人，2014年至2022年曾在上海外滩的House Club - Bar Rouge担任驻场DJ，擅长各种类型的House风格。

2001年左右他在天津财经大学里的一家小酒吧开始了他的DJ生涯，2005年在上海与好友汪澂（Chase Wang）组成了一支主打Breaks风格的DJ团体 - “青团（Qing Tuan）"，定期在上海一些著名的电音俱乐部如dkd演出。后来DJ Doggy的音乐风格趋向于Deep House，在全国各个地下场景和音乐节都留下了足迹，随后他开始了音乐制作，2012年4月，他的首张EP - 《Work It Out》在西安神秘电音厂牌“华山唱片”（Huashan Records）下发行（https://www.beatport.com/release/work-it-out-ep/895302）。2013年7月1号，他的单曲”弄堂模子”(Long Tang Mu Zi)受到俄罗斯Deep House厂牌Highway Records的青睐并发行（https://www.beatport.com/track/long-tang-mo-zi/4494677）。2014年9月，其单曲She’s a Cat被收录到葡萄牙里斯本厂牌Labareda的一张中国电子音乐合辑中 - 《Xina Eletronica》。2017年，他的两首单曲Forest和Passing By分别发表在国内电子音乐厂牌燃音乐的第五张和第六张Ran Groove合集中。到了2022年，受疫情影响现场演出减少的情况下，DJ Doggy把更多的精力用在了音乐制作上，在Taiji Records发布了多首Deep House单曲（https://www.beatport.com/label/taiji-records/75168），并在AROS Music Records旗下发布了两张EP，包含六首曲目的《Never Never Land》和包含八首曲目的《This Is The Way》（https://www.beatport.com/label/aros-music/87785），涵盖Organic House, Deep House, Breaks等多种风格。

DJ Doggy有两个主要的Mix系列，Deep Grooves和Groove Heaven，Deep Grooves侧重于Deep House, Afro House, Acid House等多种地下House风格，而Groove Heaven则以Disco, Funky House为主。他在网易云有收录其大部分Mix的电台 - "Late Night Shanghai" （https://music.163.com/#/djradio?id=564016）。国外平台有Mixcloud：http://www.mixcloud.com/djdoggy 。

DJ Doggy曾连续三年入选豆瓣网阿比鹿音乐奖最佳电子音乐人，并与2012年最终获得阿比鹿音乐奖年度最佳电子音乐人。2010年他在上海世博会德国馆作为嘉宾DJ演出。2019年5月2号，他参加了Boiler Room上海站的演出（https://v.qq.com/x/cover/mzc0010082ku1pb/n0867f5hd6i.html）。



Mingyu Shr AKA DJ Doggy is a Chinese electronic music producer. He was a resident DJ at Shanghai's House Music Club - Bar Rouge on the Bund from 2014 to 2022, specializing in various types of House music.  

He started his DJ career in a small bar called 'Xu Yuan' at Tianjin University of Finance and Economics around 2001. In 2005, he and his friend Chase Wang formed a Breaks style DJ group 'Qing Tuan' in Shanghai, playing regularly at many underground clubs in Shanghai, such as dkd.  DJ Doggy's music style later shifted towards Deep House, making his mark in underground scenes and festivals across the whole country, he started to produce his own music around 2009, in April 2012,  His debut EP - 'Work It Out' released at xi 'an's mysterious electronic label -  'Huashan Records' (https://www.beatport.com/release/work-it-out-ep/895302).  On July 1st, 2013,  His single "Long Tang Mu Zi" released at the Deep House label  - 'Highway' from Russia  (https://www.beatport.com/track/long-tang-mo-zi/4494677).  In September 2014, her single "She's a Cat‘ was included in a Chinese electronic music compilation album - ’Xina Eletronica’ by Labareda, a Portuguese label.  In 2017, his two singles 'Forest' and 'Passing By' were released on the fifth and sixth Ran Groove (Beijing)'s compilation.  In 2022, with fewer performances due to the COVID situation, DJ Doggy focused more on producing music,  In Taiji Records (Shanghai) he released many Deep House Music singles(https://www.beatport.com/label/taiji-records/75168), and in AROS Music Records, released two EPs so far,  first one is 'Never Never Land' with 6 tracks (https://www.beatport.com/release/never-never-land/3753316) and the second is 'This Is The Way' with 8 tracks (https://www.beatport.com/release/this-is-the-way/3851093), including Organic House, Deep House, Breaks and other styles.  

DJ Doggy has two main mix set series, Deep Grooves and Groove Heaven, Deep Grooves focuses on a variety of underground House styles such as Deep House, Afro House, Acid House,  and Groove Heaven is more Disco, Funky House.  He has a radio station called 'Late Night Shanghai' on NetEase (https://music.163.com/#/djradio?id=564016).  

DJ Doggy has been nominated as the Best Electronic Musician for three consecutive years at Douban's Abilu Music Awards, and won the Best Electronic Musician of Abilu Music Awards in 2012.  In 2010, he performed at the German Pavilion at Shanghai Expo. On May 2, 2019, he performed at the Boiler Room Shanghai (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Azx7s0VjcP8).
